source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/231016 내부검토/아비즈 MDR TCF_231017/A-TCF-5-153 General Safety and Performance Requirements Checklist (rev.1).docx

document.title: Checklist for the General Safety and Performance Requirements
document.documentType: General Safety and Performance Requirements checklist

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz GSPR checklist mapping MDR Annex I requirements to applicability, standards, methods, and controlled supporting documents.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Technical documentation evidence for CE MDR general safety and performance requirements conformity assessment.
keyPoints: Prepared, reviewed, and approved on October 20, 2023 by R&D, R&D Manager, and Quality Manager roles.
Manufacturer shown as H&abyz Co., Ltd. with Republic of Korea address.

Applicable requirements are mapped to risk management, safety and essential performance testing, EMC, DQE testing, software validation, biocompatibility, clinical evaluation, PMS, labeling, and user manual evidence.
The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.

Multiple MDR Annex I sections are marked not applicable, including Annex XVI, medicinal substances, biological origin materials, sterilisation, radiation emission, implantable-device requirements, and lay-person use.

evidence.claim: The device is not listed in MDR Annex XVI according to the checklist.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not listed in Annex XVI, not applicable.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to emit radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not emitted radiation.

evidence.claim: The device incorporates software or electronic programmable systems addressed by EN 62304 and MDCG 2019-16.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 62304:2006 MDCG 2019-16 Software Development & Validation report Software Development plan: A-TCF-5-143 (Rev.0) Software Validation report: A-TCF-5-131 (Rev.0)

evidence.claim: The device depends on an internal power supply according to the checklist.
evidence.evidenceText: The device depends on an internal power supply.

evidence.claim: The device is not intended for sterilisation according to multiple checklist entries.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not intended for sterilisation.

evidence.claim: The device is not designed for lay persons and is for radiologist use only according to the checklist.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is not designed for lay persons, not applicable. Radiologist use only.

evidence.claim: The device is reusable according to the checklist label/IFU entries.
The device is non-sterile according to sterile packaging entries.
The checklist requires user manual and label evidence for information supplied with the device.
evidence.evidenceText: Providing User manual and label with appropriate symbols and correct usage. Label and packaging specification: A-TCF-5-163 (Rev.1) User Manual: A-TCF-5-130 (Rev.1)

reviewFlags.reason: Product models are present in source metadata/path but not explicitly named in the body text.
Revision is taken from the source filename '(rev.1)' because the body text does not separately state the checklist revision.
The checklist contains several low-quality or awkward OCR/text-conversion phrases, including 'Non sterilie device', 't the time limit', and 'This device is not emitted radiation'.
Authority is indicated by source metadata/path and MDR article references, but the body text does not state a full regulation title or competent authority name.
